creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #1)

I think closing this issue may have been premature. The referenced port adds the APCu package, but not the APCu Backwards Compatibility module (https://pecl.php.net/package/apcu_bc). It is a separate thing on top of the APCu module for PHP 7.0.
